aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic online presence but lacks critical elements for strong AEO readiness, such as structured data and comprehensive content.
quick_wins: Implement schema markup to enhance search engine understanding of the business.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions and customer testimonials.
Optimize for local SEO by ensuring consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across the web.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and engagement.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a GBP but it is not actively managed, with no reviews and minimal engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of regular updates or posts on GBP.
No images or videos showcasing services or team.

nap_citations.summary: NAP citations are inconsistent and need improvement to boost local SEO.
action_items: Audit and correct NAP citations across all major directories and platforms.
Ensure NAP consistency on the website and social media profiles.
Actively manage and update NAP information on Google Business Profile and other key platforms.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and comprehensive content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Search engines and AI tools that rely on structured data to understand and rank content.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement basic schema markup for LocalBusiness and Service types.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Enhance content with detailed service descriptions, customer testimonials, and case studies to establish authority and improve visibility.

page_title: Manuel & Sons – Over three decades of A/C repair experience.
